ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transaction_fees" (
  "block_num" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the blockchain block */,
  "safe_low" INTEGER /* Estimated fee for safeLow transactions */,
  "average" INTEGER /* Estimated average fee for transactions */,
  "fast" INTEGER /* Estimated fee for fast transactions */,
  "fastest" INTEGER /* Estimated fee for fastest transactions */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction fees were estimated */,
  "network" TEXT /* Blockchain network for which the fees are estimated */,
  "gas_limit" INTEGER /* Gas limit for the block */,
  "block_size" INTEGER /* Size of the block in bytes */,
  "transaction_count" INTEGER /* Number of transactions in the block */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_num")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "network" TEXT /* Blockchain network the user has access to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access was granted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "network")
)
